results.rendered_html:
ā-√krand P. -krandati (aor. 3. pl. ākrandizuH,  Bhaṭṭ. ) to shout out,  PārGṛ. ;  MBh. iii, 11461 ;
to invoke, call for help,  Kād. ;  Kathās.  :
P. Ā. to cry with sorrow, lament, weep,  MBh. iii, 2388 ;  BhP.  &c.:
Caus. (Impv. 2. sg. -krandaya) to inspire (courage) by its sound (as a drum),  RV. vi, 47, 30 ;
(p. -krandayat) to shout at, roar at,  AV. ii, 36, 6 ;  VS. xvi, 19 ;  ŚBr. ;
to cry without interruption,  L.  : to cause to lament or weep,  BhP.
